creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
I tested both diff, the one you uploaded before and the recent one. Both gave me the same error during the fetch. It should be reproducible if you force redownload by cleaning distfiles. This particular issue actually can be fixed by manual editing of GH_TUPLE and some extra hacking on port-extract, but I thought it would be rather annoying doing that after each update. I'll do more testing tonight and see if GH_TUPLE variant can be salvaged.

sysutils is probably fine. I'll also add PKGNAMEPREFIX before committing.
